channel.title: projects on Aoki, Kota
channel.description: Recent content in projects on Aoki, Kota

item.title: Physical fatigue detection
item.description:
Which set of time-series skeleton data was captured when the participant was fatigued? Click on these images to go pages containing other images.
The list of publications ¶

item.title: Dual task
item.description: The dual-task paradigm is a promising procedure for estimating cognitive status, and may also be collaterally used to reduce cognitive decline and prevent dementia for older adults. The list of publications ¶
